'''balacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squab|squab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squab|squab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| balacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bælæchæth|bælæchæth]] || [[word:bælæchæj|bælæchæj]] || [[word:bælæchæsh|bælæchæsh]] || [[word:bælæchæ|bælæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:balalachath|balalachath]] || [[word:balalachaj|balalachaj]] || [[word:balalachash|balalachash]] || [[word:balalacha|balalacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:balachath|balachath]] || [[word:balachaj|balachaj]] || [[word:balachash|balachash]] || [[word:balacha|balacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:balafchafth|balafchafth]] || [[word:balafchafj|balafchafj]] || [[word:balafchafsh|balafchafsh]] || [[word:balafchaf|balafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:balachatha|balachatha]] || [[word:balachaja|balachaja]] || [[word:balachasha|balachasha]] || [[word:balachaka|balachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:balachath|balachath]] || [[word:balachaj|balachaj]] || [[word:balachash|balachash]] || [[word:balacha|balacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:balachathal|balachathal]] || [[word:balachajal|balachajal]] || [[word:balachashal|balachashal]] || [[word:balachakal|balachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:balachaathatha|balachaathatha]] || [[word:balachaajaja|balachaajaja]] || [[word:balachaashasha|balachaashasha]] || [[word:balachaaka|balachaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:balachathan|balachathan]] || [[word:balachajan|balachajan]] || [[word:balachashan|balachashan]] || [[word:balachakan|balachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:balachathaoro|balachathaoro]] || [[word:balachajaoro|balachajaoro]] || [[word:balachashaoro|balachashaoro]] || [[word:balachakaoro|balachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|c579b50}}
